docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF BERLIK, ZACHARY AS TO DEFENDANT GARCIA, ALVIN AN INDIVIDUAL JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BERLIK, ZACHARY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GARCIA, ALVIN AN INDIVIDUAL $2,287.35 PRINCIPAL, $14.17 INTEREST, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,526.52, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
NOTICE OF ASSIGNMENT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BERLIK, ZACHARY AS TO ASSIGNEE LABOR COMMISSIONER
